description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script to update apt-get quietly, install bison, build-essential, curl, dosfstools, flex, fuse, genisoimage, git, gnupg, libfuse-dev, nasm, pkg-config, software-properties-common, syslinux, syslinux-utils, texinfo, wget, and then install rustup with no default toolchain. Define variables GIT_CHECKOUT='true', GIT_STRATEGY='pull', GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY='recursive'. Add a single job named img (default stage) that executes: source "$HOME/.cargo/env", rustup update, rustup component add rust-src, cargo install cargo-config cargo-xbuild xargo, pushd bootloader-efi, rustup update, rustup component add rust-src, popd, make ci-img IMG_TAG=$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME. Configure the img job to publish the build/img/ directory as an artifact that expires in one week. No specific Docker image or services are required.
